text.fullText: Hi I’m a owner operator and I have concerns about the brokers making us sign a waiver giving up our rights to see exactly what the loads pay and load details.This has cost me to lose money and get blacklisted from companies such as Ryan transportation and pls logistics us carriers have no fight and when we seek smart or are very knowledgeable of how this trucking goes we are told they cant work with us.Brokers are looking for the cheapest guy and are stealing the fuel surcharges and are real arrogant and cocky I ask that you guys please level the playing field and help us out we have heavy regulations on us and it’s a free for all for brokers they are defrauding us and making massive profits off the work we put in and they have no risks I pray that you guys would discontinue the clause they have that forces us to waive our rights in order to book a load.I feel if brokers are being fair what’s their to hide
